name: buyseekk
description: BuySeek — Mercado invertido de autos e inmuebles

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @buyseekk/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @buyseekk/api" "npm run dev -w @buyseekk/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @buyseekk/shared && npm run build -w @buyseekk/api && npm run build -w @buyseekk/web
